recommendations.director: Lyndale V. Pettus, Cess Silvera, Adam Doench

recommendations.title: The Dead
recommendations.overview: After a convivial holiday dinner party, things begin to unravel when a husband and wife address some prickly issues concerning their marriage.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Side Effects
recommendations.overview: A woman turns to prescription medication as a way of handling her anxiety concerning her husband's upcoming release from prison.

recommendations.title: Loft
recommendations.overview: Five close friends, all of them married, share a loft to meet their mistresses. One day they find the body of a young woman in the loft. Since there are only five keys to the loft, the five men begin to suspect each other of murder.

recommendations.title: Victoria
recommendations.overview: A young Spanish woman who has newly moved to Berlin finds her flirtation with a local guy turn potentially deadly as their night out with his friends reveals a dangerous secret.

recommendations.title: The Hidden Blade

recommendations.title: Caddo Lake
recommendations.overview: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes on Caddo Lake, a series of past deaths and disappearances begin to link together, forever altering a broken family’s history.

recommendations.title: The Lover
